personal.name: Prabhat Soni
personal.title: Senior Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Building scalable web & mobile experiences with React, TypeScript & Azure

hero.headline: I engineer software that scales
hero.subheadline: Senior Software Engineer specializing in React, TypeScript, React Native, and Azure cloud solutions. Turning complex problems into high-performance, production-ready applications.

bio: I'm a results-driven Software Engineer with expertise in full-stack development, cloud computing, and DevOps. Currently working as a Senior Software Engineer at Optum Global Solutions, where I design and deliver high-performance solutions for enterprise clients.

My core strength lies in the React ecosystem — building scalable web apps with React and TypeScript, cross-platform mobile apps with React Native, and cloud-native backends on Azure. I've migrated legacy systems to modern stacks, improving performance, scalability, and developer experience.

Beyond my day job, I'm passionate about building side projects that push my skills — from language translation apps powered by AI to real-time video communication platforms. I also have a background in mentoring, having served as a Teaching Assistant at Coding Ninja.

values.title: Scalability First
values.description: I architect solutions that grow with your users. Performance and scalability are built in from day one, not bolted on later.

values.title: Clean Code Advocate
values.description: Readable, maintainable, and well-tested code matters. I reduce technical debt, not add to it.

values.title: End-to-End Ownership
values.description: From frontend UI to cloud deployment, I own the full lifecycle of what I build — debugging, troubleshooting, and optimization included.

values.title: Continuous Learning
values.description: Certified in Azure Fundamentals, trained in ethical hacking, and always exploring new technologies to deliver the best solutions.

workingStyle: I thrive in Agile environments with clear sprint cycles
I collaborate closely with development and QA teams for robust delivery
I'm experienced with cross-functional teams and client-facing communication
I use Git, GitHub, and modern CI/CD workflows for project management

services.title: Web Application Development
services.description: Full-stack web applications built with React and Next.js, optimized for performance and scalability. From enterprise dashboards to modern SaaS platforms.
features: Server-side rendering & static generation with Next.js
API design and Azure Function App integration

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Cross-platform mobile applications using React Native and Expo. Native performance with a single codebase for iOS and Android.

services.title: Azure Cloud & DevOps
services.description: Cloud-native solutions on Microsoft Azure. From serverless functions to full deployment pipelines, I help teams ship faster with confidence.

services.title: Frontend Architecture & Consulting
services.description: Technical leadership for frontend teams. Architecture reviews, legacy migration strategies, and performance audits for modern React applications.

experience.description: Designing and implementing scalable, high-performance solutions for healthcare and enterprise clients at UnitedHealth Group's technology arm.
highlights: Collaborated with development and QA teams to design and implement scalable, high-performance solutions that met client requirements
Migrated legacy code to React, improving performance, scalability, and maintainability while enhancing the user experience
Reduced technical debt through systematic modernization of the frontend architecture

experience.description: Analyzed problems and worked with teams to develop solutions at a global financial services company.
highlights: Analyzed problems and worked with teams to develop solutions
Participated in workshops and presentations related to projects to gain knowledge

projects.title: Splitwise — Expense Sharing App
projects.shortDescription: Full-featured React Native expense sharing app with offline-first architecture and OCR receipt scanning
projects.description: A comprehensive expense sharing mobile application built with React Native and Expo, featuring offline-first architecture, OCR receipt scanning, multi-currency support, debt simplification, analytics dashboards, and biometric authentication. Uses MongoDB for backend storage with automatic sync queue for offline mutations.

caseStudy.problem: Existing expense-splitting apps require constant internet connectivity and lack features like receipt scanning, multi-currency support, and detailed analytics.
caseStudy.solution: Built an offline-first React Native app with full local storage, automatic sync queue, OCR-based receipt scanning, and a greedy debt simplification algorithm.
approach: Implemented offline-first architecture with AsyncStorage + MongoDB sync queue
Integrated OCR.space API for camera-based receipt scanning with smart total extraction
Built 12-currency support with live exchange rates and offline fallback
Developed analytics dashboard with spending trends, category breakdowns, and YoY comparison
Added biometric authentication (Face ID, Fingerprint) via expo-local-authentication
caseStudy.outcome: A production-ready expense sharing app with 14 features including recurring expenses, push notifications, dark mode, CSV/PDF export, and visual debt simplification diagrams.

projects.title: NoteGenius — AI Voice Notes
projects.shortDescription: Offline-first voice notes app with AI summarization and spaced-repetition flashcards
projects.description: An offline-first voice notes application built with React Native and Expo SDK 54. Features live transcription, AI-powered summarization (offline NLP + Google Gemini), auto-generated flashcards with SM-2 spaced repetition, and multi-language speech-to-text support.

caseStudy.problem: Professionals need a way to capture meeting notes via voice, get automatic summaries, and study key takeaways — all without relying on cloud connectivity.
caseStudy.solution: Built an offline-first React Native app with on-device speech-to-text, a custom TextRank NLP pipeline for extractive summarization, and SM-2 spaced repetition for flashcard review.
approach: Implemented on-device speech-to-text via @react-native-voice/voice supporting 8 languages
Built custom NLP pipeline with TextRank summarization, sentiment analysis, and keyword extraction
Added optional Google Gemini cloud provider with encrypted API key storage
Developed SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm for auto-generated flashcards (Q&A, cloze, term-def)
Used SQLite (WAL mode) + MMKV for fully offline data persistence
caseStudy.outcome: A fully functional voice-to-flashcard pipeline that works entirely offline, with optional cloud AI enhancement via Gemini.

projects.title: PDF RAG Chat
projects.shortDescription: Upload PDFs and chat with them using AI — answers grounded in your documents with citations
projects.description: A full-stack Next.js application for uploading PDF documents and chatting with them using Google Gemini AI. Features semantic vector search, smart text chunking, streaming responses, and citation references to specific pages and chunks.

caseStudy.problem: Professionals need to quickly extract answers from large PDF documents without reading them cover to cover.
caseStudy.solution: Built a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline that chunks PDFs, generates embeddings with Google's text-embedding-004, and answers questions with cited sources.
approach: Implemented smart text chunking with 1200-char chunks and 180-char overlap
Generated semantic embeddings using Google text-embedding-004 (768 dimensions)
Built vector search with in-memory store (dev) and Pinecone (production)
Integrated Google Gemini for streaming AI responses with page/chunk citations
Added health check and models API endpoints for monitoring
caseStudy.outcome: A production-deployed RAG application on Vercel that lets users upload PDFs and get accurate, cited answers in real-time via streaming.

projects.title: Prestige Realty — Real Estate Platform
projects.shortDescription: Production-ready real estate website with 3D hero, Supabase auth, and property listings
projects.description: A production-ready real estate agency website built with Next.js 16 App Router, MUI v7, Framer Motion, and React Three Fiber. Features interactive 3D hero scene, property listings with filters, agent profiles, Supabase authentication, and favourites system.

caseStudy.problem: Real estate agencies need a modern, interactive web presence with property search, agent profiles, and user authentication — not just a static brochure site.
caseStudy.solution: Built a full-featured Next.js 16 platform with 3D animated hero, filterable listings, Supabase-powered auth and favourites, and server actions for enquiries.
approach: Created an interactive Three.js hero scene with React Three Fiber and Drei
Built filterable property listings with URL-based search params for shareability
Integrated Supabase for auth, favourites, and enquiry form submissions via Server Actions
Implemented mock mode for running fully without Supabase backend
Added scroll-triggered Framer Motion animations across 14 pages
caseStudy.outcome: A deployed real estate platform with 14 pages including listings, agent profiles, favourites, FAQ, and legal pages — with full authentication and database integration.

projects.title: Google Translate Clone
projects.shortDescription: Language translation app with Azure, OpenAI, Clerk auth, and MongoDB history
projects.description: A language translation application replicating core Google Translate functionalities. Built with Next.js, integrating Microsoft Azure for cloud infrastructure, Clerk for user authentication, MongoDB with Mongoose for translation history, and OpenAI for enhanced translation accuracy.

caseStudy.problem: Users needed a translation tool with persistent history, authenticated sessions, and AI-powered accuracy — going beyond basic browser-based translation.
caseStudy.solution: Built a Next.js application with Azure Cognitive Services for translation, Clerk for authentication, and MongoDB for storing translation history with full CRUD operations.
approach: Integrated Microsoft Azure Translator API for multi-language support
Implemented Clerk authentication for user session management
Built MongoDB + Mongoose backend for persistent translation history
Leveraged OpenAI API for enhanced translation context and suggestions
caseStudy.outcome: A production-ready translation app deployed on Vercel with authenticated user sessions, persistent history, and AI-enhanced translations supporting 100+ languages.

projects.title: Kashya — E-Commerce Platform
projects.shortDescription: Girls clothing e-commerce website built with Next.js and TypeScript
projects.description: A modern e-commerce website for girls' clothing built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features product browsing, responsive design, and a clean shopping experience deployed on Vercel.

projects.title: YouTube Growth Hub
projects.shortDescription: YouTube channel analytics and growth strategy platform with AI-powered insights
projects.description: A YouTube creator growth platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features channel analytics, content strategy tools, and AI-powered insights to help creators grow their audience and optimise their content.

caseStudy.problem: YouTube creators struggle to understand what drives channel growth — they lack actionable analytics and content strategy tools in one place.
caseStudy.solution: Built a growth hub that aggregates channel data via the YouTube API and surfaces AI-powered recommendations for content optimisation and audience growth.
approach: Integrated YouTube Data API for channel and video analytics
Built content performance dashboards with engagement metrics
Added AI-powered content strategy suggestions
Designed a clean creator-focused UI with Next.js and Tailwind CSS
Deployed on Vercel with static generation for fast load times
caseStudy.outcome: A live creator analytics platform at youtube-growth-hub.vercel.app that gives YouTubers data-driven insights to accelerate channel growth.

projects.title: AR Menu — Augmented Reality Restaurant Menu
projects.shortDescription: Web-based AR restaurant menu that lets diners visualise dishes in 3D before ordering
projects.description: A web-based augmented reality restaurant menu built with Next.js and TypeScript. Lets diners scan a QR code and visualise menu items as interactive 3D models in their real environment before placing an order.

caseStudy.problem: Restaurant menus with static images fail to convey portion sizes and presentation, leading to order uncertainty and customer dissatisfaction.
caseStudy.solution: Built a WebXR-powered AR menu where diners can place 3D dish models on their table via their phone camera before ordering.
approach: Implemented WebXR / model-viewer for browser-native AR without app installs
Created 3D dish models and integrated them with menu item data
Built a QR-code-accessible menu UI optimised for mobile browsers
Used Next.js for fast static delivery and Tailwind CSS for the menu UI
Deployed on Vercel for zero-config global CDN delivery
caseStudy.outcome: A live AR menu experience at ar-menu-lyart.vercel.app that lets diners preview dishes in 3D — no app download required.

projects.title: Ticketr — Event Ticketing Platform
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack event ticketing platform with Stripe payments, Convex backend, and QR code tickets
projects.description: A full-stack event ticketing platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features event creation, seat management, Stripe-powered payments, QR code ticket generation, and a real-time backend powered by Convex.

caseStudy.problem: Event organisers need a self-serve ticketing solution with real-time seat availability, secure payments, and digital ticket delivery — without paying high platform fees.
caseStudy.solution: Built a full-stack ticketing platform with Stripe Checkout for payments, Convex for real-time data sync, and QR code generation for digital ticket delivery.
approach: Integrated Stripe Checkout for secure, PCI-compliant payment processing
Used Convex as a real-time backend for live seat availability updates
Generated QR code tickets post-purchase for digital entry validation
Built event creation and management dashboard for organisers
Deployed on Vercel with Next.js App Router and TypeScript
caseStudy.outcome: A live ticketing platform at ticketr-psoni.vercel.app with end-to-end event creation, payment, and QR ticket delivery.

projects.title: AyurFresh — Ayurvedic Wellness Platform
projects.shortDescription: Modern e-commerce and wellness platform for Ayurvedic products with product listings and cart
projects.description: A modern Ayurvedic wellness web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features product listings, category browsing, a shopping cart, and a clean wellness-focused UI — deployed live on Vercel.

caseStudy.problem: Ayurvedic wellness brands lack modern, trustworthy e-commerce storefronts that communicate product benefits and make purchasing seamless.
caseStudy.solution: Built a clean, wellness-focused product platform with category filtering, detailed product pages, and a shopping cart — designed to build brand trust and drive conversions.
approach: Designed product listing pages with category filters and search
Built detailed product pages with ingredients, benefits, and usage info
Implemented a shopping cart with quantity management
Used Next.js static generation for fast, SEO-friendly product pages
Styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, natural wellness aesthetic
caseStudy.outcome: A live Ayurvedic e-commerce platform at ayurfresh-web.vercel.app with a full product browsing and cart experience.

projects.title: CaptionCraft — AI Caption Generator
projects.shortDescription: AI-powered social media caption generator for Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn
projects.description: An AI-powered caption generation tool built with Next.js and TypeScript. Users input a topic or image description and get platform-optimised captions for Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn — with tone and style controls.

caseStudy.problem: Content creators and marketers spend significant time writing captions for every social platform — each requiring a different tone, length, and hashtag strategy.
caseStudy.solution: Built an AI caption generator that takes a topic or description and produces platform-specific captions with tone controls, saving creators hours of copywriting.
approach: Integrated OpenAI API to generate platform-optimised captions
Built tone and style selectors (professional, casual, witty, inspirational)
Added platform tabs for Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn outputs
Implemented one-click copy for each generated caption
Designed a minimal, distraction-free UI with Tailwind CSS
caseStudy.outcome: A focused AI tool that generates ready-to-post captions for multiple social platforms in seconds, with full tone customisation.

projects.title: Person Search App
projects.shortDescription: People search application with real-time filtering, profile cards, and detailed person views
projects.description: A people search web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features real-time search and filtering across a person dataset, profile card listings, and detailed individual views.

caseStudy.problem: Searching through large datasets of people records is slow and cumbersome without a dedicated, filterable UI.
caseStudy.solution: Built a fast person search app with real-time filtering by name, role, and other attributes — displaying results as clean profile cards with detailed views.
approach: Implemented real-time search with debounced input for performance
Built multi-attribute filtering (name, role, location)
Designed profile card grid with expandable detail views
Used Next.js dynamic routing for individual person pages
Optimised for large datasets with client-side filtering
caseStudy.outcome: A performant people search interface with real-time filtering and clean profile presentation, demonstrating advanced React state and data handling.

projects.title: Tours & Travels — Travel Booking Platform
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack travel booking platform with destination listings, tour packages, and enquiry management
projects.description: A full-stack tours and travels web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features destination listings, tour package browsing, itinerary details, and a booking enquiry flow — deployed live on Vercel.

caseStudy.problem: Travel agencies rely on manual enquiries and outdated brochure sites that fail to showcase destinations effectively or capture leads digitally.
caseStudy.solution: Built a modern travel platform where users can explore destinations, browse curated tour packages with itineraries, and submit booking enquiries — all in one seamless experience.
approach: Designed destination listing pages with imagery, highlights, and travel details
Built tour package cards with pricing, duration, inclusions, and itinerary breakdowns
Implemented a booking enquiry form with destination and date selection
Used Next.js App Router with TypeScript for type-safe, statically generated pages
Deployed on Vercel with a responsive Tailwind CSS UI optimised for visual storytelling
caseStudy.outcome: A live travel booking platform at tours-travels-rust.vercel.app that gives travel agencies a modern, lead-generating web presence with rich destination content.

projects.title: IronEdge — Gym & Fitness Platform
projects.shortDescription: Modern gym website with membership plans, class schedules, trainer profiles, and online sign-up
projects.description: A modern gym and fitness web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features membership plan listings, class schedules, trainer profiles, and an online sign-up flow — deployed live as IronEdge on Vercel.

caseStudy.problem: Gyms and fitness studios lack a professional digital presence to showcase their services, trainers, and membership options — losing potential members to competitors with better websites.
caseStudy.solution: Built a high-energy gym platform with membership plan comparisons, class timetables, trainer profiles, and a streamlined sign-up flow to convert visitors into members.
approach: Designed membership plan cards with feature comparisons and pricing tiers
Built a class schedule section with day-wise timetable and category filters
Created trainer profile pages with specialisations and experience details
Implemented an online sign-up flow for membership enquiries
Used Next.js App Router with TypeScript for fast, statically generated pages deployed on Vercel
caseStudy.outcome: A live, production-deployed gym platform at gym-ironedge.vercel.app that gives fitness businesses a bold, conversion-focused web presence.

projects.title: Clinic Webapp — Healthcare Appointment Platform
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack clinic management platform with doctor listings, appointment booking, and patient management
projects.description: A full-stack healthcare clinic web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features doctor profiles, service listings, appointment booking flow, and a patient-facing dashboard — deployed live on Vercel.

caseStudy.problem: Small clinics manage appointments manually via phone or walk-ins, leading to scheduling conflicts, long wait times, and no digital record of patient interactions.
caseStudy.solution: Built a modern clinic platform where patients can browse doctors, view available slots, and book appointments online — while the clinic gets a structured view of all bookings.
approach: Designed doctor profile pages with specialisation, availability, and contact details
Built an appointment booking flow with date and time slot selection
Implemented a patient-facing dashboard to view and manage upcoming appointments
Used Next.js App Router with TypeScript for type-safe, server-rendered pages
Deployed on Vercel with a clean, accessible Tailwind CSS UI
caseStudy.outcome: A live clinic management platform at clinic-psoni.vercel.app that digitises the end-to-end appointment experience for both patients and clinic staff.

projects.title: Salon Webapp — Booking & Management Platform
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack salon booking platform with service listings, appointment scheduling, and admin management
projects.description: A full-stack salon booking and management web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features service listings, appointment scheduling, admin dashboard for managing bookings, and a clean responsive UI with Tailwind CSS.

caseStudy.problem: Salons rely on phone calls and walk-ins for bookings, leading to scheduling conflicts, missed appointments, and no visibility into daily operations.
caseStudy.solution: Built a full-stack booking platform where clients can browse services and book appointments online, while admins manage schedules through a dedicated dashboard.
approach: Designed service listing pages with pricing and duration details
Built appointment scheduling flow with date/time slot selection
Implemented admin dashboard for viewing and managing bookings
Used MongoDB for persistent booking and service data storage
Deployed on Vercel with a fully responsive Tailwind CSS UI
caseStudy.outcome: A production-ready salon management platform that streamlines the booking experience for both clients and salon staff.

projects.title: E-Auction Platform
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack online auction platform with real-time bidding, authentication, and CRUD operations
projects.description: A full-stack online auction platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features auction listing creation and editing, a real-time bidding system, user authentication, bid history tracking, and a fully responsive UI with Tailwind CSS and MongoDB as the backend database.

caseStudy.problem: Traditional auction processes are manual, location-bound, and lack transparency — bidders miss opportunities and sellers have no real-time visibility into bid activity.
caseStudy.solution: Built a full-stack auction platform where sellers can list items with starting bids and deadlines, and buyers can place competitive bids in real time with full bid history.
approach: Implemented auction listing CRUD — create, edit, close, and delete auctions
Built real-time bidding system with bid validation and outbid detection
Added user authentication to scope bids and listings per account
Stored bid history and auction state in MongoDB with Mongoose schemas
Designed a responsive UI with Tailwind CSS for seamless desktop and mobile experience
caseStudy.outcome: A production-ready auction platform with end-to-end bidding flow, authenticated user sessions, and persistent auction and bid data.

projects.title: Café Webapp — Restaurant & Menu Platform
projects.shortDescription: Modern café website with menu listings, online ordering flow, and a clean responsive UI
projects.description: A modern café and restaurant web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features a beautifully designed menu with category filtering, an online ordering flow, and a fully responsive layout — deployed live on Vercel.

caseStudy.problem: Small cafés and restaurants lack an affordable, modern web presence — most rely on outdated static sites or third-party platforms that don't reflect their brand.
caseStudy.solution: Built a clean, fast Next.js café website with a categorised menu, ordering flow, and a polished UI that any café can adapt as their digital storefront.
approach: Designed a categorised menu page with item cards showing name, description, and price
Built an ordering flow with item selection and order summary
Used Next.js App Router with static generation for fast page loads
Styled with Tailwind CSS for a warm, on-brand aesthetic
Deployed on Vercel with zero-config CI/CD
caseStudy.outcome: A live, production-deployed café platform showcasing a complete restaurant web experience with menu browsing and ordering — accessible at cafe-webapp-gamma.vercel.app.

projects.title: Email Sender
projects.shortDescription: Bulk email sending tool built with Next.js and multiple sender profiles
projects.description: A Next.js-based email sending application with support for multiple sender profiles, file attachments, and a clean interface for composing and sending emails. Deployed on Vercel.

projects.title: JobFill - Intelligent Job Autofill Extension
projects.shortDescription: Manifest V3 Chrome extension that autofills job applications using local profile data and heuristic field matching
projects.description: A production-ready Chrome extension for automatically filling job application forms using locally stored profile data. Built with Manifest V3 architecture, heuristic confidence-based field matching, domain overrides, and in-browser PDF/DOCX resume parsing with no user data leaving the device.

caseStudy.problem: Job seekers waste significant time repeatedly filling the same application fields across different hiring portals, and generic browser autofill often struggles with custom forms and inconsistent field labels.
caseStudy.solution: Built a Manifest V3 Chrome extension that stores structured job-profile data locally, scans application forms in the browser, and fills fields using heuristic scoring, confidence tiers, and per-domain overrides.
approach: Designed a modular extension architecture with popup, options UI, service worker, content script, and shared storage utilities
Implemented fingerprint-based field matching using labels, placeholders, autocomplete hints, nearby text, regex scoring, and confidence thresholds
Added domain-specific override mappings so known hiring sites can bypass heuristic ambiguity with exact field-to-profile resolution
Integrated fully client-side PDF.js and Mammoth.js resume parsing to extract candidate details without sending documents to a server
Handled SPA navigation and dynamic job portals with MutationObserver-based rescans and review highlights for medium-confidence matches
caseStudy.outcome: A privacy-first browser extension that speeds up repetitive job applications while keeping all profile and resume data on-device, with smarter matching than standard browser autofill.

projects.title: Toggle Dark Mode — Browser Extension
projects.shortDescription: Chrome extension that injects dark mode on any website with a single click
projects.description: A lightweight Chrome browser extension built with vanilla JavaScript and CSS that toggles dark mode on any website. Uses CSS filter inversion and hue-rotation to apply a dark theme universally, with state persistence across page navigations via Chrome's storage API.

caseStudy.problem: Many websites don't support dark mode natively, forcing users to browse bright, eye-straining interfaces — especially at night or in low-light environments.
caseStudy.solution: Built a Chrome extension that injects a CSS dark mode filter on any webpage with a single toolbar click, persisting the preference per site using Chrome's storage API.
approach: Used CSS filter: invert(1) hue-rotate(180deg) to apply dark mode universally across any site
Built a content script to inject and toggle the filter on the active tab's document
Persisted dark mode state per domain using chrome.storage.local
Designed a minimal popup UI with a toggle switch for one-click activation
Added a Python utility script for extension packaging and automation
caseStudy.outcome: A zero-dependency browser extension that brings dark mode to any website instantly, with per-site memory so preferences are retained across sessions.

projects.title: Storyteller AI
projects.shortDescription: AI-powered storytelling platform built with Next.js and ShadCN UI
projects.description: An AI-powered storytelling application built with Next.js. Features a polished UI with ShadCN components and Tailwind CSS for generating and browsing AI-created stories.

projects.title: Enterprise Healthcare Dashboard
projects.shortDescription: Scalable React dashboard for healthcare enterprise clients at Optum
projects.description: A high-performance enterprise dashboard built during my tenure at Optum Global Solutions. Migrated from a legacy codebase to modern React with TypeScript, significantly improving performance, maintainability, and user experience.

caseStudy.problem: Legacy healthcare application suffered from poor performance, high technical debt, and difficulty in onboarding new developers due to outdated architecture.
caseStudy.solution: Led a systematic migration from legacy code to React with TypeScript, implementing modern patterns, improving performance, and establishing scalable architecture.
approach: Audited existing codebase to identify migration priorities
Incrementally migrated components to React with TypeScript
Collaborated with QA teams to ensure client requirements were met
Established coding standards and component patterns for the team
caseStudy.outcome: Successfully modernized the frontend, reducing load times and improving developer velocity. The solution met all client requirements and reduced ongoing maintenance burden.

projects.title: Coaching Web App — Online Learning Platform
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack coaching and online learning platform with course listings, student management, and enrollment flow
projects.description: A full-stack online coaching web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features course listings, instructor profiles, student enrollment flow, and a clean responsive UI — built to help coaching institutes establish a modern digital presence.

caseStudy.problem: Coaching institutes rely on word-of-mouth and offline registrations, lacking a professional web presence to showcase courses, instructors, and drive online enrollments.
caseStudy.solution: Built a modern coaching platform where students can browse courses, view instructor profiles, and enroll online — giving institutes a conversion-focused digital storefront.
approach: Designed course listing pages with subject categories, duration, and pricing
Built instructor profile pages with qualifications and course associations
Implemented a student enrollment and inquiry flow
Used Next.js App Router with TypeScript for type-safe, statically generated pages
Styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, professional educational aesthetic
caseStudy.outcome: A production-ready coaching platform that gives educational institutes a modern web presence with structured course and instructor information.

projects.title: Dice — Dice Rolling Game
projects.shortDescription: A simple dice rolling game built with C# and Unity
projects.description: A dice rolling game built with C# and Unity. Players can roll dice and see the results in a fun, interactive 3D environment.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.shortDescription: Animated portfolio site built with Next.js and Framer Motion
projects.description: A modern, animation-driven portfolio website showcasing projects and skills. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion with scroll-based animations, 3D perspective effects, and a fully static architecture.

testimonials.name: Aparajita Patro
testimonials.quote: Prabhat played a key role in our React migration. His ability to modernize legacy code while maintaining stability was impressive. He consistently delivered high-quality work and collaborated effectively with QA and product teams.

testimonials.name: Saurabh Sharma
testimonials.quote: Working with Prabhat was a great experience. He brought strong TypeScript and React skills to the team, and his debugging abilities saved us significant time on complex issues. A reliable and skilled engineer.

testimonials.name: Neha Gupta
testimonials.quote: Prabhat was an excellent teaching assistant. He was patient, explained concepts clearly, and always made time for one-on-one sessions. His mentoring helped me crack my first coding interview.

testimonials.name: Anvesh
testimonials.quote: Prabhat consistently delivered solutions that met our client requirements. His attention to performance optimization and clean code practices set a great standard for the team.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: I start by understanding the problem deeply — the business context, users, and technical constraints — before writing any code.

process.title: Architecture & Planning
process.description: A solid technical foundation saves months of development time. I design the system architecture and create a detailed project roadmap.

process.title: Design & Prototyping
process.description: Before full development, I validate ideas with prototypes. Fast iteration at this stage saves significant time and budget.

process.title: Development
process.description: Agile development with regular demos and continuous deployment. You'll see progress every sprint, not just at the end.

process.title: Testing & QA
process.description: Close collaboration with QA teams to ensure comprehensive testing before any release. I build solutions that work reliably.
details: QA team collaboration and bug resolution

process.title: Launch & Support
process.description: A smooth launch with proper monitoring. I provide post-launch support and iterative improvements based on real user feedback.
